texto: Too many believe that love is a condition, a feeling that involves 100 percent of the heart, something that happens to you. They disassociate love from the mind and, therefore, from agency. In commanding us to love, the Lord refers to something much deeper than romance — a love that is the most profound form of loyalty. He is teaching us that love is something more than feelings of the heart; it is also a covenant we keep with soul and mind.
explicacao: Citação de Lynn G. Robbins sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Too many believe that love is a condition, a feeling that involves 100 percent of the heart, some…” articula amor, commitment, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como casamento e love.
